data.title: 国际服MIka观察日志「A Day in the Life of Mika」&「Misono Mika's Secret Diary」
data.summary: [Observation Log: ] Sensei! Come join us to get to know our charming Mika, a Fest student now availa
data.body:
[Observation Log: ]

Sensei!
Come join us to get to know our charming Mika, a Fest student now available for recruitment!

For the next three days, starting tomorrow, we'll get to take a little peek into Mika's daily routine together! 

#BlueArchive
![RFccLwuFl9OW37BwAjy3P1tFhfsploX4.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/RFccLwuFl9OW37BwAjy3P1tFhfsploX4.jpg)

[A Day in the Life of Mika: Day 1 - Daytime]

We're in the exclusive room of the Tea Party, the Student Council of Trinity General School, where Mika attends! But the mood seems a little off at this tea party... 

#BlueArchive![AS4qN2Fypq6VTC7LGFz1tjXWz1q5OTOM.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/AS4qN2Fypq6VTC7LGFz1tjXWz1q5OTOM.jpg)

[A Day in the Life of Mika: Day 1 - Evening]

The Tea Party Room after the meeting... Nagisa had a rather dark expression on her face while talking about roll cakes. Could roll cakes be...Mika's weakness?!

#BlueArchive![uFQQskCvSoSnCNyEdRGaSLuJrJvaYJNe.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/uFQQskCvSoSnCNyEdRGaSLuJrJvaYJNe.jpg)

[A Day in the Life of Mika: Day 2 - Morning]

Mika is visiting the Make-Up Work Club's classroom early this morning!
Judging by the looks on Hifumi and Azusa's faces, they've gotten a rather difficult request... 🤔

#BlueArchive
![gQFMZj27pVtzzVerfsqTgJObnK1HsKCh.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/gQFMZj27pVtzzVerfsqTgJObnK1HsKCh.jpg)
[A Day in the Life of Mika. Day 2 - Evening]

Oh, the Make-Up Work Club members' properties are scattered all—
Huh? What's this pamphlet for? It's almost as if someone left it here for us to find... 

#BlueArchive
![L2CrfFg00wLMRzupMo8ajraa9tSp96At.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/L2CrfFg00wLMRzupMo8ajraa9tSp96At.jpg)![osO9v7hLzVTf0974RRE5up2cPye4u8zj.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/osO9v7hLzVTf0974RRE5up2cPye4u8zj.jpg)

[A Day in the Life of Mika. Day 3 - Morning]

Oh! Mika is singing for the Grand Cathedral chapel class!
Ah... Her angelic voice really strikes a chord in our hearts.👼

#BlueArchive

[A Day in the Life of Mika. Day 3 - Night]

We've really gotten to know Mika more over the past few days!
Huh? Sensei, there's a letter on the desk! Who's it from...? 

#BlueArchive

![xmstS6PjNE2t61CxRQ5e0IO86Iy0ac6A.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/xmstS6PjNE2t61CxRQ5e0IO86Iy0ac6A.jpg)![bi8ObMbb7q9kHQUa5HNkZ7nWUNRxCBYX.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/bi8ObMbb7q9kHQUa5HNkZ7nWUNRxCBYX.jpg)

[Misono Mika's Secret Diary] #1, #2

Sensei! Here are the first two episodes of Mika's Secret Diary from the in-game event! Enjoy~!

#BlueArchive
![H1kaeQI3eyatIpGoIVLrBZzyIiLJC4cr.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/H1kaeQI3eyatIpGoIVLrBZzyIiLJC4cr.jpg)![LEWpLj1OFXmHlJBLmzu8O6RmJVeScr4B.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/LEWpLj1OFXmHlJBLmzu8O6RmJVeScr4B.jpg)

[Misono Mika's Secret Diary] #3, #4

Sensei! Here are the next two episodes of Mika's Secret Diary from the in-game event!

[Misono Mika's Secret Diary] #5, #6

Sensei! Here are the last two episodes of Mika's Secret Diary from the in-game event!
